hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The triangle function takes 7 arguments: x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3, color

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Draw the white cheeks first so they appear behind the face

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The ears are a darker orange (brown) than the face (orange)

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The nose is made of two dark triangles (charcoal)
